# GitHub Pages Configuration for MessWala Docs

This folder contains production-ready documentation for MessWala.

## 📚 Folder Contents

- **index.md** — Main landing page
- **guides/** — User guides and getting started
- **api/** — API documentation
- **architecture/** — System design docs
- **deployment/** — Deployment instructions
- **admin/** — Admin guides
- **mkdocs.yml** — MkDocs configuration for GitHub Pages

## 🚀 Publishing

### GitHub Pages Automatic Publishing

1. Go to Repository → Settings → Pages
2. Source: Branch (`main`)
3. Folder: `/docs`
4. Save

Documentation automatically publishes at:
- `https://soumyadeepsarkar-2004.github.io/MessWala/`

### MkDocs Local Build

```bash
# Install MkDocs
pip install mkdocs-material

# Serve locally
cd docs
mkdocs serve
# Open http://localhost:8000
```

### Deploy with MkDocs

```bash
mkdocs gh-deploy
```

## 📖 Navigation

Start at [index.md](index.md) for the main documentation hub.

All documentation is:
- ✅ Version controlled
- ✅ Production-ready
- ✅ Professionally formatted
- ✅ Fully indexed and searchable
- ✅ No security secrets exposed
- ✅ Mobile responsive
- ✅ Standards compliant

## 📝 Edit & Contribute

All files are plain Markdown:
- Edit in any text editor
- Or use GitHub web editor
- Preview before committing
- Changes auto-publish
